#                                                                            
#    Project:           Contact Zone Scoring
#    Description:       Demonstrates how to get discs from blue dispenser,
#                       how to throw a disc into the scoring area, and how
#                       to score on the Purple Contact Zone.
#    Starting Position: C
#                                                                            
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------


# Add project code in "main"
def main():
    # Setting the velocity
    drivetrain.set_turn_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    drivetrain.set_drive_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    intake_motor.set_velocity(60, PERCENT)
    arm_motor.set_velocity(100, PERCENT)

    # Go to the left Blue Dispenser
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 90, MM)
    drivetrain.turn_for(LEFT, 90, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 290, MM)

    # Knock the discs down
    arm_motor.spin_for(FORWARD, 140, DEGREES)
    arm_motor.spin_for(REVERSE, 140, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.turn_for(RIGHT, 90, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 800, MM)
    drivetrain.turn_for(RIGHT, 23, DEGREES)

    # Take a disc into the intake
    intake_motor.spin(FORWARD)
    drivetrain.drive_for(REVERSE, 290, MM)

    # Stop spinning intake once bumper is pressed,
    # then move to scoring position and set desired velocity
    while not intake_bumper.pressing():
        wait(20, MSEC)
    intake_motor.stop()
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 400, MM)
    intake_motor.set_velocity(30, PERCENT)

    # Spin the intake to throw the disc, and stop once the disc has been thrown
    intake_motor.spin(FORWARD)
    while intake_bumper.pressing():
        wait(20, MSEC)
    wait(1, SECONDS)
    intake_motor.stop()
    drivetrain.turn_for(RIGHT, 65, DEGREES)

    # Position the Robot and extend the Arm to reach the Purple Contact Zone
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 1000, MM)
    drivetrain.turn_for(LEFT, 90, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.drive_for(REVERSE, 20, MM)
    arm_motor.spin_for(FORWARD, 360, DEGREES)

vr_thread(main)

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
#                                                                            
#    Project:           Identifying Dispensers                                   
#    Description:       This example shows how the front_optical sensor can be
#                       used to identify the dispensers. Dispensers are color
#                       coded and can be identified using the optical sensor.
#    Starting Position: C
#                                                                            
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------


# Add project code in "main"
def main():
    # Dispensers can be identified by their color using front_optical
    drivetrain.drive(FORWARD)
    while front_optical.color() is not YELLOW:
        wait(20, MSEC)
    brain.screen.print("Yellow Dispenser detected!")
    drivetrain.stop()

vr_thread(main)

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------

#    Description:       This example shows how to score by throwing a disc
#                       without the use of any sensors.
#    Starting Position: C
#
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------


# Add project code in "main"
def main():
    # Setting the velocity
    drivetrain.set_turn_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    drivetrain.set_drive_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    arm_motor.set_velocity(100, PERCENT)

    # Go to the left blue dispenser
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 90, MM)
    drivetrain.turn_for(LEFT, 90, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 290, MM)

    # Knock the disc down and reposition to pick up a disc
    arm_motor.spin_for(FORWARD, 140, DEGREES)
    arm_motor.spin_for(REVERSE, 140, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.turn_for(RIGHT, 90, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 800, MM)
    drivetrain.turn_for(RIGHT, 23, DEGREES)

    # Take a disc into the intake
    intake_motor.spin(FORWARD)
    drivetrain.drive_for(REVERSE, 300, MM)
    intake_motor.stop()
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 400, MM)

    # Turn and throw the disc
    intake_motor.set_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    drivetrain.turn_for(LEFT, 15, DEGREES)
    intake_motor.spin_for(FORWARD, 3000, DEGREES)

vr_thread(main)

# constructors

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
#                                                                            
#    Project:           Scoring With Sensors                                 
#    Description:       This example shows how to score by throwing a 
#                       disc with the use of sensors.
#    Starting Position: C
#                                                                            
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------


# Add project code in "main"
def main():
    # Setting the velocity
    drivetrain.set_turn_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    drivetrain.set_drive_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    intake_motor.set_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    arm_motor.set_velocity(100, PERCENT)

    # Go to the left blue dispenser
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 200, MM)
    drivetrain.turn_for(RIGHT, 90, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 290, MM)

    # Knock the discs down
    arm_motor.spin_for(FORWARD, 140, DEGREES)
    arm_motor.spin_for(REVERSE, 140, DEGREES)

    # Position the robot to intake a disc
    drivetrain.turn_for(LEFT, 90, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 700, MM)
    drivetrain.turn_for(LEFT, 25, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.drive(REVERSE)

    # Pull a disc into the intake
    intake_motor.spin(FORWARD)
    while not intake_bumper.pressing():
        wait(20, MSEC)
    intake_motor.stop()

    # Drive toward the fence until it is 200mm away
    drivetrain.drive(FORWARD)
    while not front_distance.object_distance(MM) < 200:
        wait(20, MSEC)
    drivetrain.stop()

    # Spin the intake until the disc is thrown
    intake_motor.spin(FORWARD)
    while intake_bumper.pressing():
        wait(20, MSEC)
    wait(1, SECONDS)
    intake_motor.stop()

vr_thread(main)

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
#
#    Project:           Monitoring Sensor Values
#    Description:       This example will spin the intake_motor until the
#                       intake_bumper is pressed, indicating a disc has been
#                       pulled into the Intake.
#    Starting Position: C
#    Note:              Open up the Monitor Tab to the right to see the
#                       intake_bumper pressed value. Selecting the checkbox
#                       next to a reporter sensing block in the Toolbox will
#                       add the value reported by the selected block to the
#                       Monitor Tab.
#
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------


# Function to pull a disc into the intake
def intake_disc():
    intake_motor.spin(FORWARD)
    while not intake_bumper.pressing():
        wait(20, MSEC)
    intake_motor.stop()
    drivetrain.stop()


# Add project code in "main"
def main():
    # Set the monitor tab to keep track of intake_bumper sensor
    monitor_sensor("intake_bumper.pressing")

    # Setting the velocity
    drivetrain.set_turn_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    drivetrain.set_drive_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    intake_motor.set_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    arm_motor.set_velocity(100, PERCENT)

    # Go to the left blue dispenser
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 200, MM)
    drivetrain.turn_for(RIGHT, 90, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 290, MM)

    # Knock the discs down
    arm_motor.spin_for(FORWARD, 140, DEGREES)
    arm_motor.spin_for(REVERSE, 140, DEGREES)

    # Position the robot to intake a disc
    drivetrain.turn_for(LEFT, 90, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, 700, MM)
    drivetrain.turn_for(LEFT, 25, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.drive(REVERSE)

    # Pull a disc into the intake and stop
    intake_disc()

vr_thread(main)

#region VEXcode Generated Robot Configuration
import math
import random
from vexcode_viqc import *
from vexcode_viqc.events import get_Task_func
  
# constructors

drivetrain = Drivetrain()
brain = Brain()
intake_motor = Motor("IntakeMotor", 1)
intake_bumper = Bumper("Bumper", 2)
front_distance = Distance("Distance", 3)
front_optical = Optical("Optical", 5)
arm_motor = Motor("ArmMotor", 10)
#endregion VEXcode Generated Robot Configuration
drive_amount = 0

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
#
#    Project:           Monitoring Variable Values
#    Description:       This example will spin the IntakeMotor until a disc
#                       has been pulled into the Intake.
#    Starting Position: C
#    Note:              Open up the Monitor Tab to the right to see the
#                       Variables Monitor. Selecting the checkbox next to a
#                       variable in the toolbox adds the variable to the
#                       Monitor Tab.
#
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------


# Function to pull a disc into the Intake
def intake_disc():
    global drive_amount
    intake_motor.spin(FORWARD)
    while not intake_bumper.pressing():
        wait(20, MSEC)
    intake_motor.stop()
    drivetrain.stop()


# Add project code in "main"
def main():
    global drive_amount

    # Set the monitor tab to keep track of drive_amount variable
    monitor_variable("drive_amount")

    # Setting the  initial drive_amount variable value
    drive_amount = 200
    drivetrain.set_turn_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    drivetrain.set_drive_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    intake_motor.set_velocity(100, PERCENT)
    arm_motor.set_velocity(100, PERCENT)

    # Drive forward for drive_amount (200mm)
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, drive_amount, MM)
    drivetrain.turn_for(RIGHT, 90, DEGREES)

    # Update the drive_amount by 90 (200 + 90 = 290)
    drive_amount = drive_amount + 90

    # Drive forward for drive_amount (290mm)
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, drive_amount, MM)

    # Knock the discs down
    arm_motor.spin_for(FORWARD, 140, DEGREES)
    arm_motor.spin_for(REVERSE, 140, DEGREES)

    # Position the robot to intake a disc
    drivetrain.turn_for(LEFT, 90, DEGREES)

    # Update the drive_amount by 410 (290 + 410 = 700)
    drive_amount = drive_amount + 410

    # Drive forward for drive_amount (700mm)
    drivetrain.drive_for(FORWARD, drive_amount, MM)
    drivetrain.turn_for(LEFT, 25, DEGREES)
    drivetrain.drive(REVERSE)

    # Pull a disc into the intake and stop
    intake_disc()

vr_thread(main)
